findings.message: New `redis-exporter` service (oliver006/redis_exporter, metrics on :9121) is added with no matching Prometheus scrape job. `infra/observability/prometheus/prometheus.yml` has scrape_configs for app, prometheus, otel-collector, and postgres only — nothing targets `redis-exporter:9121`, so the exporter's metrics are never collected. The new exporter is dead weight: no scrape, and consequently no alert rule (infra/observability/prometheus/alerts/) and no Grafana dashboard for Redis. Either the scrape target is missing or the exporter should not have been added.
findings.suggestion:
Add a scrape job to infra/observability/prometheus/prometheus.yml, e.g.:
  - job_name: redis
    static_configs:
      - targets: ["redis-exporter:9121"]
and follow up with a Redis alert rule (infra/observability/prometheus/alerts/redis_alerts.yml) and a Grafana dashboard so the new surface is actually observable.
